# fastly_service_product_ngwaf (Resource)

Enables Next-Gen WAF on a service. Product Enablement operates on the service directly rather than a specific service version, so this resource is not tied to a `version` and applies immediately.



## Schema

### Required

- `service_id` (String) The ID of the service to enable Next-Gen WAF on. Changing this value will delete and recreate this resource against the new service.
- `workspace_id` (String) The Next-Gen WAF workspace to link.

### Optional

- `traffic_ramp` (Number) The percentage of traffic to inspect. Only supported for CDN services; defaults to 100.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource (identical to `service_id`).
